jobs.title: C++ Developer
jobs.description: C++ Developer Zensar Technologies Apply Now Save C++ Developer Zensar Technologies Pune , India Fresher Apply Now Save Posted a day ago Be among the first 10 applicants Early Applicant Job Description Overview JOB DESCRIPTION Product Development role building and enhancing fintech software applications; collaborates in agile/SAFe teams. Focuses on backend processing for money movement applications within a retail solutions development team. Primary Responsibilities Develop and enhance software using C++/C# and modern .NET technologies. Work with scrum teams to deliver backend processing capabilities and support associated pipelines/tools. Participate in design, development, testing, debugging, and documentation activities. Collaborate with engineering partners and contribute to continuous improvement and reliable delivery. Required Skills & Qualifications Experience designing/developing C++ and C# applications; familiarity with .NET Framework and .NET Core, multithreading, SOLID and design patterns. Strong understanding of relational databases and PL/SQL. Experience working in scrum teams; strong communication and teamwork skills. Experience with source control (Git/Bitbucket/Artifactory) and build tools (Jenkins/Ansible). Experience leveraging AI in the code development process. Desired Skills SAFe experience; knowledge of products; banking/financial services domain knowledge. Experience & Level Experienced (relevant combination of work and education). Location / Travel Onsite location (Brown Deer, WI) indicated; travel not specified. Assumptions & Notes Based on Careers Website JD and summarized in own word Responsibilities QUALIFICATIONS About Us At Zensar, we're experience-led everything . We are committed to conceptualizing, designing, engineering, marketing, and managing digital solutions and experiences for over 130 leading enterprises.
